'''Danyawarra''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who was the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ludwin Katarkus]]. In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], they accompanied Katarkus as part of a Jedi [[Envoy/Legends|envoy]] attempting to resolve the [[Virgillian Civil War]], but the mission ended in disaster when their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was attacked upon arrival. They served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a Padawan [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual, Danyawarra [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] under the tenets of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ludwin Katarkus]].<ref name="HNN45">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|jediwatch/13228_1.html|Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost}}</ref>

[[File:Jabiim-SWCW.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The 101st Regiment, which Danyawarra commanded during the Clone Wars]]
In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]],<ref name="HNN date 23">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|jediwatch/13228_1.html|Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost}} is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:2:28," which corresponds to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[Envoy/Legends|envoy]] was [[Mission to Virgillia 7|sent]] to<ref name="HNN45" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Bakura Sourcebook">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Virgillia 7]]<ref name="Skyewalkers">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref> to mediate the ongoing [[Virgillian Civil War]] between the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] and the [[Aristocracy]] in the [[Virgillia system/Legends|Virgillia system]]. Consisting of two Master-Padawan teams, the diplomatic envoy was made up of Master Katarkus, Danyawarra, Master [[Everen Ettene]], and Padawan [[Halagad Ventor]]. As the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] carrying the Jedi envoy arrived, it was attacked and destroyed. After receiving no word from the diplomatic team for three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], the team was declared lost in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] published on 13:2:28 [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]]. The article also announced that the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on<ref name="HNN45" /> the planet<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] would be holding [[Jedi funeral/Legends|memorial services]] for them the next [[Standard day/Legends|day]].<ref name="HNN45" />

Although Katarkus<ref name="CSWE Danyawarra">{{CSWECite|I|165|Danyawarra}}</ref> and Ettene both [[Death/Legends|died]] during the mission,<ref name="Skyewalkers" /> Danyawarra survived and rejoined the Order,<ref name="Insider" /> as did Ventor.<ref name="Skyewalkers" /> Danyawarra served as a Padawan [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding]] the [[101st Regiment]], which consisted of 2,304 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]].<ref name="Insider" />

==Behind the scenes==
Danyawarra was first mentioned in the article "Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost" in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN45" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] before [[March 10]], [[2002]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=threads/5990764|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-10|time=7:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20201002154704/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764}}</ref>
